column1: # tests/test-wiring-exempt.tsv — EXPLICIT allowlist of tests/test-*.sh files that are
# intentionally NOT wired into the merge-gate suite (tests/herd.bats / scripts/ci/run-suite.sh
# Every tests/test-*.sh file must be either:
#   (a) referenced by tests/herd.bats (the gate runs it), or
#   (b) listed here with a non-empty reason (genuinely not a gate test OR a known pre-existing
#       red that must not block the suite until a dedicated fix-PR lands).
# A new unexempted + unwired test file is a CODE error (the test-wiring ratchet).
# Prefer WIRING over exempting. Env-fragile tests that still SHOULD run belong in the suite +
# tests/known-env-sensitive.tsv (XFAIL), not here: an exempt test is never executed by the gate.
#   name    the test file basename, e.g. test-foo.sh
#   reason  one-line why it is not in the gate (required, non-empty)
